en_title: Call of Duty: Black Ops Port Deemed 'Unplayable' As Lobbies Are Filled With Exploiters
cn_title: 《使命召唤：黑色行动》移植版遭作弊者攻陷，无法游玩
subtitle: 作弊者毁掉多人大厅
opus_summary: 《使命召唤：黑色行动》PS4/PS5移植版被作弊大厅占据，玩家自爆刷满级，服务器问题与漏洞让多人模式几乎无法游玩，正常玩家纷纷离开。

paragraphs.en: The new PS4 and PS5 port of Call of Duty: Black Ops is being called "unplayable" by fans after exploits have consumed multiplayer lobbies.
paragraphs.cn: 全新PS4和PS5版《使命召唤：黑色行动》被漏洞占据多人大厅后，粉丝纷纷称其「无法游玩」。

paragraphs.en: Last week, Activision released PS4 and PS5 ports of the first two Black Ops games , much to the joy of fans. Although they're a bit pricy for games that have no major updates or changes , fans were just excited to be able to revisit the games they love. With that said, the experience hasn't been smooth. In addition to server and hit registration issues, players are also running into compromised lobbies.
paragraphs.cn: 上周，动视推出了前两部《黑色行动》的PS4和PS5移植版，令粉丝十分兴奋。虽然对于没有重大更新或改动的游戏来说价格略高，但玩家还是很高兴能重温喜爱的作品。不过体验并不顺利：除了服务器和命中判定问题，玩家还遇到了被破坏的大厅。

paragraphs.en: Players are able to easily host modded lobbies in Black Ops 1, allowing players to exploit the game. If you manage to get into one of these lobbies, you can just blow yourself up with a grenade as soon as you spawn, leave the game, and you will hit max rank. As a result of this, players are just entering lobbies and blowing themselves up immediately and then leaving. If the entire enemy team quits, you will win by default due to forfeit. As a result, some fans are frustrated as they can't really play or enjoy the game.
paragraphs.cn: 玩家可以轻松在《黑色行动1》中创建改造大厅，从而利用游戏漏洞。如果进入这类大厅，出生后立刻用手雷炸死自己、退出游戏，就能直接达到最高等级。因此，玩家纷纷进大厅后马上自爆再离开；如果敌方整队退出，你还会因对手弃权而自动获胜。结果是，一些粉丝根本无法正常游玩或享受游戏，十分沮丧。

paragraphs.en: Black Ops 1 port is filled with people blowing themselves up to hit max level instantly on a 16 year old COD pic.twitter.com/toYRP8wXfq
paragraphs.cn: 《黑色行动1》移植版充斥着自爆瞬间满级的玩家——这是一张16年前COD图片下的配文pic.twitter.com/toYRP8wXfq

paragraphs.en: "So [Black Ops 1] is now infected with the XP thing where you max level by nading yourself then leaving," said one player . "It's leading to unplayable lobbies." Another player echoed these sentiments : "[Black Ops 1 Ground War] is literally ruined with this XP glitch. Cannot play a lobby without 6 people leaving, rejoining, and killing themselves over and over again. What a joke."
paragraphs.cn: 一名玩家说：「所以《黑色行动1》现在被这种经验值漏洞感染了：用手雷炸死自己再退出就能满级，导致大厅根本无法游玩。」另一名玩家也表示：「《黑色行动1：地面战争》真的被这个经验漏洞毁了。一个大厅里总有6个人不断退出、重进、反复自杀，根本没法玩。真是笑话。」

paragraphs.en: Others are using this as an opportunity to point out the hypocrisy among players, as fans have begged for new versions of older COD games only to have players ruin it.
paragraphs.cn: 其他人则借此指出玩家群体的虚伪：粉丝苦苦请求推出老COD游戏的新版本，结果却是玩家亲手把它毁掉。

paragraphs.en: "I don’t know what’s people obsession with getting into EXP lobbies or paying money for an UNLOCKALL like we all moaned about how s**t the current state of COD was and then as soon as we get something good, you find the quickest way to exploit the ports… hasn’t even been a week."
paragraphs.cn: 「我不明白大家为什么执着于进入经验大厅，或花钱买「解锁全部」。我们都抱怨当前COD状态有多烂，可一有好东西，你们就立刻寻找利用移植版漏洞的最快方法……这甚至还不到一周。」

paragraphs.en: There are still some lobbies you can get into, but you will still see the odd player blowing themselves up in the killfeed. Ultimately, it's far from an ideal experience. Call of Duty fans have been begging Activision to re-release older entries of the franchise for over a decade and now that it has happened, they are trying to race to become the highest level in the game, even if it calls for exploits.
paragraphs.cn: 仍有一些大厅可以进入，但击杀信息中依然会偶尔出现自爆玩家。归根结底，这远非理想体验。十多年来，《使命召唤》粉丝一直请求动视重发系列旧作；如今愿望成真，他们却在争先恐后冲到游戏最高等级，即便这需要利用漏洞。

paragraphs.en: It's a disappointing outcome, and given such little effort was put into these ports, it's hard to imagine there will be any moderation or notable updates to fix these kinds of issues. One can only hope that once a large portion of the player base hits max rank, this issue will go away. However, it's also hard to imagine players sticking around for long if they have nothing to progress towards or unlock.
paragraphs.cn: 结果令人失望。考虑到这些移植版投入的精力如此之少，很难想象会有审核或重要更新来修复这类问题。只能希望大部分玩家达到最高等级后，问题会自行消失。不过，如果没有可供推进或解锁的内容，玩家恐怕也不会长期留下。
